title: Genesis
summary: Genesis establishes creation, fall, covenant, and the patriarchal beginnings of redemptive history.

title: Exodus
summary: Exodus reveals deliverance, covenant, law, worship, and the forming of a people under God.

title: Leviticus
summary: Leviticus structures holiness, sacrifice, priesthood, and sacred order before the Lord.

title: Numbers
summary: Numbers traces wilderness testing, rebellion, preservation, and covenant continuity.

title: Deuteronomy
summary: Deuteronomy renews covenant memory, obedience, warning, and blessing before entry into the land.

title: Joshua
summary: Joshua records conquest, inheritance, covenant settlement, and the faithfulness of God.

title: Judges
summary: Judges shows the cycle of rebellion, oppression, deliverance, and moral collapse.

title: Ruth
summary: Ruth reveals covenant loyalty, providence, redemption, and messianic lineage through humble faithfulness.

title: 1 Samuel
summary: 1 Samuel narrates prophetic transition, kingship, obedience, and the rise of David.

title: 2 Samuel
summary: 2 Samuel centers on Davidic rule, covenant promise, sin, judgment, and kingdom complexity.

title: 1 Kings
summary: 1 Kings records temple glory, divided kingdoms, prophetic confrontation, and covenant decline.

title: 2 Kings
summary: 2 Kings traces judgment, exile, prophetic witness, and the consequences of covenant failure.

title: 1 Chronicles
summary: 1 Chronicles re-centers lineage, worship, Davidic order, and covenant memory.

title: 2 Chronicles
summary: 2 Chronicles emphasizes temple life, reform, judgment, and hope after collapse.

title: Jubilees
summary: Jubilees retells sacred history through covenant structure, chronology, and holiness.

title: 1 Enoch
summary: 1 Enoch develops judgment, heavenly order, rebellion, and apocalyptic witness.

title: Ezra
summary: Ezra records return, restoration, temple renewal, and covenant recommitment.

title: Nehemiah
summary: Nehemiah focuses on rebuilding, leadership, repentance, and communal restoration.

title: Tobit
summary: Tobit presents faithfulness, providence, angelic help, and righteous endurance.

title: Judith
summary: Judith highlights courage, deliverance, and divine victory through faithful action.

title: Esther
summary: Esther reveals providence, preservation, courage, and covenant survival under threat.

title: 1 Meqabyan
summary: 1 Meqabyan witnesses to fidelity, resistance, and righteousness under pressure.

title: 2 Meqabyan
summary: 2 Meqabyan expands themes of endurance, faith, and divine justice.

title: 3 Meqabyan
summary: 3 Meqabyan continues the witness of steadfastness, testing, and covenant integrity.

title: Job
summary: Job confronts suffering, righteousness, mystery, and the sovereignty of God.

title: Psalms
summary: Psalms gathers praise, lament, kingship, repentance, and worship before God.

title: Proverbs
summary: Proverbs teaches wisdom, discipline, righteousness, speech, and covenant discernment.

title: Ecclesiastes
summary: Ecclesiastes reflects on vanity, mortality, meaning, and reverence before God.

title: Song of Songs
summary: Song of Songs celebrates love, beauty, longing, and covenant affection.

title: Wisdom
summary: Wisdom presents righteousness, divine wisdom, judgment, and the contrast with folly.

title: Sirach
summary: Sirach teaches moral wisdom, discipline, tradition, and reverence in daily life.

title: Isaiah
summary: Isaiah proclaims holiness, judgment, messianic hope, and redemptive restoration.

title: Jeremiah
summary: Jeremiah announces judgment, lament, covenant warning, and future restoration.

title: Lamentations
summary: Lamentations mourns destruction while holding to covenant grief and hope.

title: Baruch
summary: Baruch emphasizes repentance, wisdom, exile, and hope in God’s mercy.

title: Ezekiel
summary: Ezekiel joins judgment, vision, temple symbolism, and restoration through divine glory.

title: Daniel
summary: Daniel unites exile faithfulness, apocalyptic vision, kingdoms, and divine sovereignty.

title: Hosea
summary: Hosea reveals covenant unfaithfulness, mercy, judgment, and redeeming love.

title: Joel
summary: Joel declares the day of the Lord, repentance, restoration, and outpoured Spirit.

title: Amos
summary: Amos confronts injustice, false security, judgment, and the righteousness of God.

title: Obadiah
summary: Obadiah proclaims judgment against pride and the vindication of God’s people.

title: Jonah
summary: Jonah displays mercy, resistance, repentance, and the wideness of divine compassion.

title: Micah
summary: Micah joins judgment, justice, messianic promise, and covenant ethics.

title: Nahum
summary: Nahum announces judgment on oppressive power and the justice of God.

title: Habakkuk
summary: Habakkuk wrestles with justice, waiting, faith, and trust amid crisis.

title: Zephaniah
summary: Zephaniah warns of judgment while promising purification and restoration.

title: Haggai
summary: Haggai urges rebuilding, obedience, covenant priority, and renewed hope.

title: Zechariah
summary: Zechariah blends vision, cleansing, kingship, and messianic expectation.

title: Malachi
summary: Malachi confronts covenant negligence and points toward coming purification.

title: Matthew
summary: Matthew presents Jesus as Messiah, teacher, king, and fulfillment of scripture.

title: Mark
summary: Mark emphasizes the authority, suffering, action, and identity of Jesus.

title: Luke
summary: Luke highlights salvation, compassion, history, and the universal scope of Christ.

title: John
summary: John proclaims the divine identity, signs, love, and glory of Jesus Christ.

title: Acts
summary: Acts records the mission of the early church through the power of the Holy Spirit.

title: Romans
summary: Romans develops sin, grace, justification, covenant, and life in the Spirit.

title: 1 Corinthians
summary: 1 Corinthians addresses disorder, holiness, worship, resurrection, and covenant community.

title: 2 Corinthians
summary: 2 Corinthians centers on weakness, ministry, reconciliation, and apostolic endurance.

title: Galatians
summary: Galatians defends gospel freedom, faith, promise, and life in the Spirit.

title: Ephesians
summary: Ephesians reveals unity, new creation, spiritual warfare, and the body of Christ.

title: Philippians
summary: Philippians teaches joy, humility, endurance, and Christ-centered faithfulness.

title: Colossians
summary: Colossians magnifies the supremacy of Christ over creation, church, and spiritual powers.

title: 1 Thessalonians
summary: 1 Thessalonians encourages holiness, hope, endurance, and readiness for the Lord.

title: 2 Thessalonians
summary: 2 Thessalonians addresses perseverance, order, judgment, and eschatological clarity.

title: 1 Timothy
summary: 1 Timothy structures church order, teaching, leadership, and godly conduct.

title: 2 Timothy
summary: 2 Timothy calls for endurance, faithful teaching, courage, and perseverance in truth.

title: Titus
summary: Titus links sound doctrine, leadership, and transformed living.

title: Philemon
summary: Philemon embodies reconciliation, brotherhood, and gospel-shaped relationship.

title: Hebrews
summary: Hebrews exalts Christ as greater priest, greater sacrifice, and greater covenant mediator.

title: James
summary: James joins wisdom, obedience, speech, endurance, and living faith.

title: 1 Peter
summary: 1 Peter encourages holiness, suffering, witness, and hope in exile.

title: 2 Peter
summary: 2 Peter warns against falsehood and urges steadfastness in truth and holiness.

title: 1 John
summary: 1 John proclaims light, love, truth, assurance, and life in the Son.

title: 2 John
summary: 2 John joins truth, love, discernment, and faithfulness against deception.

title: 3 John
summary: 3 John highlights hospitality, truth, support, and faithful witness.

title: Jude
summary: Jude warns against corruption and calls the faithful to contend for truth.

title: Revelation
summary: Revelation unveils judgment, victory, worship, endurance, and the reign of God.

title: Sinodos
summary: Sinodos preserves church order, instruction, and broader canonical tradition.

title: 1 Clement
summary: 1 Clement emphasizes order, humility, repentance, and peace within the church.

title: 2 Clement
summary: 2 Clement exhorts repentance, obedience, endurance, and faithful hearing.

title: Book of the Covenant
summary: The Book of the Covenant preserves ecclesial instruction, discipline, and covenantal ordering.

title: Didascalia
summary: Didascalia gathers instruction, discipline, and teaching for ordered church life.
